name: useBreakpoints
examples: const { greater, smaller, between, current, active, ...breakpoints } = useBreakpoints({ mobile: 0, tablet: 640, laptop: 1024, desktop: 1280 });

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: The strategy to use for matching

source.source: * @param {UseBreakpointsStrategy} [strategy=min-width] The strategy to use for matching

tokens.name: [strategy=min-width]
tokens.description: The strategy to use for matching

source.source: * @returns {UseBreakpointsReturn<Breakpoint>} An object containing the current breakpoint
